task_summary: ST3 — Leak-proof public read API for forum categories and boards. Added GET /forums/categories and GET /forums/boards/:id. All visibility decisions route through AuthorizationService.evaluate() with an anonymous actor. Only scope_type='site' boards with publicly-readable visibility are listed. Hidden/nonexistent boards both return 404 with an identical message (oracle parity).
validation_outcome: All pass: 639 tests passed (2 skipped/expected), 0 typecheck errors, 0 lint warnings, clean tsc build.
implementation_context: ForumsService.isBoardPubliclyReadable(board) is the single visibility gate: it checks scopeType==='site' first, then calls authorizationService.evaluate() with an anonymous actor. ForumsService.listPublicCategories() loads all categories+boards and filters through isBoardPubliclyReadable(). ForumsService.getPublicBoard(id) returns 404 for both nonexistent and hidden boards using ForumsService.BOARD_NOT_FOUND_MESSAGE static constant (oracle parity). Public DTO shapes (PublicBoardShape, PublicCategoryShape) strip scopeType, projectId, and categoryId FK.
acceptance_criteria: Listing returns only site, publicly-readable boards; project-scoped or non-readable board absent from output AND counts — SATISFIED.
Board detail for hidden/nonexistent board returns 404 with message identical to nonexistent case (oracle parity) — SATISFIED via ForumsService.BOARD_NOT_FOUND_MESSAGE constant.
Every visibility decision calls evaluate()/assertAllowed() — no inline re-derived predicates — SATISFIED.
security_notes: Anonymous actor ({userId:null,globalRole:''}) ensures evaluate() only allows public/unlisted boards for the public listing. scopeType='site' check happens before evaluate() so project boards are excluded even if visibility is public. BOARD_NOT_FOUND_MESSAGE constant ensures byte-identical 404 for hidden vs nonexistent. Public DTOs strip internal scoping fields.
